name: CMTrace Open
description: CMTrace Open is an open-source log viewer (Tauri v2, React/TypeScript, Rust) inspired by CMTrace.exe. It supports CCM, simple, and plain text logs with real-time tailing, virtual scrolling, filtering, highlighting, and color-coded severities. It includes embedded error lookup and diagnostics (IME log analysis, event timeline, download statistics, and a summary dashboard) for quick Intune-oriented insights. Flexible input from files, folders, or drag-and-drop.
author: Adam Gell

securityCheck.aiSummary: No direct malicious behavior detected in this codebase. The changes pertain to building nightly update artifacts and diagnostics. Primary security considerations: (1) updater endpoints are external; ensure signatures and code signing are enforced in the update pipeline, (2) environment-variable expansion in the diagnostics collector could leak sensitive values if data bundles are exfiltrated; implement sanitization/redaction and strict telemetry controls. Overall, code appears legitimate for Intune/Graph-integrated management tooling when used with proper authentication and signed updates.
